coreRules: Apply the default strict catalog cleanup base. This is a no-redesign pass.
Keep the garment exactly unchanged: preserve color, texture, pattern, shape, proportions, drape, and construction.
Keep model identity unchanged: preserve face, body, skin, and hair with no beautification, reshaping, or reinterpretation.
Replace the background with a seamless off-white studio environment with no visible floor line.
Remove visual noise, color cast, and amateur studio artifacts.
Add natural grounding with soft contact shadow under both feet, subtle ambient occlusion near the soles, and a gentle floor gradient.
The subject must not appear floating.
Use soft studio lighting with a softbox key and soft fill. Keep color balance neutral and preserve natural skin texture.
Pose correction is limited: preserve camera angle, body orientation, and framing. Only allow minor professional cleanup such as straighter posture, relaxed shoulders, and subtle stance refinement.
Do not change pose direction, viewpoint class, or framing family.
Do not add new objects, props, or accessories in the base cleanup layer.
Accessory, footwear, headwear, and other styling additions belong to active entity or preset layers, not the base cleanup layer.
subjectLockRules: Preserve the exact same person: facial structure, skin tone, age impression, body proportions, and hair identity.
Do not beautify, slim, reshape, or reinterpret the face or body.
Do not restyle hair beyond minor cleanup of flyaways.
subjectReferenceRules: Use the supplied subject reference image set as the strict identity lock for all generated outputs.
When the target image and subject reference differ slightly, prefer the subject reference for identity and the target image for garment and framing.
outputRules: Keep the result suitable for e-commerce catalog use, not editorial styling.
failRules: The result is invalid if garment details drift or the hemline is shortened.
The result is invalid if the subject identity changes.
The result is invalid if the model, garment, or pose is redesigned instead of cleaned up.
The result is invalid if new props or accessories appear without explicit active entity instructions.
The result is invalid if studio gear, background artifacts, or floating-foot errors appear.
